strengths: 18+ years of fullstack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js and React product work matching the primary stack
Hands-on AI agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) — a rare required skill
Deep testing culture: TDD practitioner, authored test frameworks, created testing courses and workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed despite it being in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python are absent from the skill set; Java exposure appears dated and secondary
No direct mention of Vitest/Jest/Playwright — testing expertise is proven but partly in non-JS ecosystems (DLang)
response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with a long, verifiable track record across backend, frontend, mobile, and infrastructure, including recent staff-level work directly involving TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent tooling — the hardest requirement to source. Cloud (AWS CDK), Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB/MySQL, and a strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) cover nearly all required skills. Gaps are framework-level (Nest.js, Vitest) rather than conceptual, and someone with this breadth should close them quickly. Kotlin/Python absence is a minor drawback for the secondary stack.
